title: Good news
question: 把今天课文里“以为是坏消息，结果听到好消息”的反转放进老师、家长、教练或社团负责人的小场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: I felt very nervous when my teacher asked me to stay after class. I thought my turn had come. Then she smiled and told me I had done very well.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 老师谈话：老师很严肃地叫我留下，我以为自己有麻烦了
options.english_template: I felt very ___ when my teacher asked me to stay after class.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 误会加深：我听到前面的线索，以为这下轮到我倒霉了
options.english_template: When I heard the serious news, I thought ___.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 最后反转：对方笑了，告诉我其实是一个好消息
options.english_template: Then she smiled and told me it was ___.
